events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — Desmond Ridder had almost a full season to plan how he would celebrate his first touchdown pass.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ridder throws first 2 TD passes as Falcons top Brady, Bucs

events.name: New England Patriots at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — The echoes of “Let’s Go Buffalo!” pregame chants were still reverberating through an emotionally charged Bills stadium <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills win for Hamlin and eliminate Patriots from playoffs

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Vikings wanted nothing more than to wash away the bitter taste from a blowout loss and head into the postseason on a sweeter note.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cousins dominates first half as Vikings beat Bears 29-13

headlines.description: — The Cincinnati Bengals built a big lead and came out flat in the second half, but held off the division rival Baltimore Ravens to close the season on an eight-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bengals beat Ravens to avoid coin flip, set up home rematch
Rookie QBs Stroud and Richardson face off as Texans and Colts both look for first win

events.name: New York Jets at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — After just one successful field goal of 50-plus yards all season, it was only fitting that the Miami Dolphins' playoff hopes came down to a 50-yard kick.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins clinch playoff berth after beating Jets 11-6

events.name: Carolina Panthers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — If Steve Wilks has coached his last game for the Panthers, he can walk away knowing his players didn't quit on him.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pineiro's kick lifts Panthers to 10-7 win over Saints

headlines.description: — The Pittsburgh Steelers spent the second half of the season digging their way out of a deep hole, but they finally encountered one obstacle they couldn't overcome.
headlines.shortLinkText: Steelers beat Browns 28-14 but miss out on playoffs

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — If this was a sign of what's to come in 2023 in Denver, Russell Wilson and the Broncos faithful can breathe easier this offseason.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson, Broncos beat Herbert, playoff-bound Chargers 31-28

events.name: New York Giants at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts walked into the Linc wearing a Michael Jordan “I’m Back” T-shirt from the former Chicago Bulls’ star’s first unretirement.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts returns from injury, leads Eagles to No. 1 seed in NFC

headlines.description: Brock Purdy and the San Francisco 49ers are peaking at just the right time and now know they won't have to go on the road for at least a few more weeks.
headlines.shortLinkText: Purdy leads 49ers to 10th straight win, 38-13 over Cardinals

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Seattle Seahawks

headlines.description: — Within minutes of the Seattle Seahawks winning to maintain their playoff hopes, the video boards inside Lumen Field flashed a message:
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks top Rams 19-16 in OT, in playoffs after Lions win

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott insisted the Dallas Cowboys were worried solely about their game against Washington and had no idea what was going on in Philadelphia with the other result they would need to win the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Prescott, Cowboys fall flat in Week 18 loss to Commanders

events.name: Detroit Lions at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers will have the entire postseason to ponder his future.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers, Packers lose 20-16 to Lions, miss playoffs
